title: Kitchens 4 Living for all your cabinetry needs
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Kitchens 4 Living is celebrating 25 years’ experience and knowledge in the cupboard industry in Mossel Bay, delivering ongoing expertise, quality and service.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Kitchens 4 Living is celebrating 25 years’ experience and knowledge in the cupboard industry in Mossel Bay, delivering ongoing expertise, quality and service."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether your home is a new build, under development or just in need of a facelift, Kitchens 4 Living can assist with design options and modern finishes","html":"Whether your home is a new build, under development or just in need of a facelift, Kitchens 4 Living can assist with design options and modern finishes"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We can cover all your cabinetry needs:"},{"type":"list","items":["Makeovers","Kitchens","Bars","Vanities","Built-in cupboards","Quartz countertops","And so much more."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We began in Mossel Bay, back when kitchens had a classic, familiar look: cream-toned cupboards, oak countertops, and those recognisable external hinges. It was a time of straightforward choices, and that suited the moment.","html":"We began in Mossel Bay, back when kitchens had a classic, familiar look: cream-toned cupboards, oak countertops, and those recognisable external hinges. It was a time of straightforward choices, and that suited the moment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But design moves forward—and so did we. Granite countertops brought a new level of refinement, with Rustenburg granite quickly becoming a staple.","html":"But design moves forward—and so did we. Granite countertops brought a new level of refinement, with Rustenburg granite quickly becoming a staple."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Later, with the arrival of the wrap machine, engraved supawood designs started making their mark, especially in Cape Dutch–style homes throughout local golf estates and Pinnacle Point.","html":"Later, with the arrival of the wrap machine, engraved supawood designs started making their mark, especially in Cape Dutch–style homes throughout local golf estates and Pinnacle Point."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Today, we continue to evolve. Quartz has opened up a wide range of possibilities, and we embrace each new material and technology with care and creativity.","html":"Today, we continue to evolve. Quartz has opened up a wide range of possibilities, and we embrace each new material and technology with care and creativity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At Kitchens4Living, staying current means more than following trends - it’s about building spaces that grow with how you live.","html":"At Kitchens4Living, staying current means more than following trends - it’s about building spaces that grow with how you live."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you to our loyal clients for all your support over the past last 25 years, and please don’t forget to vote for us in the Best Kitchen Installation Company category under Professional Services!","html":"Thank you to our loyal clients for all your support over the past last 25 years, and please don’t forget to vote for us in the Best Kitchen Installation Company category under Professional Services!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We are ready to assist you with fabulous design options for ALL your cupboard and makeover needs.","html":"We are ready to assist you with fabulous design options for ALL your cupboard and makeover needs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visit Kitchens4Living showroom @ 17 Multi Centre, 6 Bolton Str, Voorbaai.","html":"Visit Kitchens4Living showroom @ 17 Multi Centre, 6 Bolton Str, Voorbaai."},{"type":"list","items":["Cell: 082 403 7550 (Bev) / 081 618 6026 (Mars)","Tel: 082 403 7550","E-mail: [email protected]","Visit our Facebook page to find out more, or to get in touch: https://www.facebook.com/kitchens4l/"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photo supplied.","html":"Photo supplied."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photo supplied.","html":"Photo supplied."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
